rationale:
v10 is implementation-ready and internally consistent with spec v2.7 and the repository trust model; I judge it executable as-is.

Trust-model conformance: Spine read-only is preserved (no merkle-dag/build-gate/breakout/connectors modifications; import direction clotho->merkle-dag only). Advisory-only is proven bidirectionally, not asserted: the inbound scanner fails closed on nonliteral require/module.require/dynamic import and real-path-checks symlink aliases (D23), and the outbound scanner is a closed allowlist over ALL specifier forms (D27) with the loader-construction prohibition governed by the exact frozen LOADER_CAPABLE_BUILTIN_SAFE_EXPORTS mapping, single-sourced from inventory.mjs (D30/D32). Fail-closed is systemic: unknown kinds/statuses/schemes reject, shallow history rejects with a stable error rather than minting a wrong repository identity, fatal warnings abort before publication with descriptor cleanup (D22), and weaver failure destroys the temporary ledger with no partial artifact (D15).

Prior-round gap closure is genuine rather than cosmetic. The D29 'executed = complete consumption' semantics eliminate the honest-undercount loophole, with the normative edge-append ordering (no edge reaches appendEdge before the accounting gate) preventing an incomplete weaver from influencing the ledger pre-rejection. D31 removes the last uncounted read path (ledger-weaver clause resolution now owns a counted contract-files inventory, proven independent of the doc-weaver including the doc-skipped flagship case). D28 freezes the publication commit point, resolving the linkSync/unlink ambiguity with three machine-visible states. The D20 EEXIST race test, D21 physical containment re-check at publication, and D18 real-git shallow/full-clone fixture convert previously asserted properties into behaviorally proven ones.

Sequencing is coherent: Task 1 before Task 0 avoids a knowingly-red workflow PR; D17 ensures no inventory names a nonexistent file; D19 cleanly splits generic ledger-integrity validation (Task 3, injected coverage) from repository-specific inventory equality (Task 5), so no task depends on artifacts that cannot yet exist. The proof boundary is honestly stated (verifier proves manifest structure; the driver proves runtime exhaustion; no claim of reconstructing iterator behavior from the signed ledger alone).

Residual risks are explicitly bounded and acceptable for an advisory, git-ignored artifact: the symlink-check TOCTOU window (risk 15) is narrowed by the repeated check and cannot affect the spine; the loader scanner's syntactic-only boundary (risk 18) fails closed on ambiguity and claims no data-flow analysis; provenance-not-signature framing for round artifacts is kept honest. Exit criteria are objective and mechanically checkable (green suites, no spine diff, committed verified reproduction evidence, 120s flagship ceiling, eight-group one-to-one matching with a mandatory unscored review set per D3).

I verified the frozen inventory-id table, the endpoint matrix (including the spec v2.3 discharges pairs and the four depends-on shapes), the status-coupling table with human-only adjudication, and the supersedes direction for consistency across the plan body, task checklists, and test obligations; I found no contradiction. No hard stops; no required edits. This seat signs.
